name: Architecture Decision Records
description: Technical decisions with context, alternatives considered, and consequences. Follows the ADR format (Michael Nygard / ThoughtWorks lineage). Each record is immutable once accepted — supersession creates a new ADR that links back. Think of ADRs as architectural git-commits with prose.

fields.name: adr_number
fields.description: Zero-padded sequential: 0001, 0002, etc. Set manually on creation.

fields.name: context_summary
fields.description: Two-paragraph summary of the problem and constraints

fields.name: alternatives_considered
fields.description: Options evaluated and why they were rejected

fields.name: superseded_by_adr
fields.description: If Status=Superseded, link to the replacing ADR
